subcodes.first_line: O cherished and beloved friends! 'Abdu'l-Bahá, though utterly weary and exhausted, hath perused the letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزیزان نازنین عبدالبهاء الان در نهایت خستگی و سستی بنامه نظاره نمودم ذکر
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @poems and quotation from poetry, @love of God
